name: chatbot-memory-migration
description: Skills for migrating user context and memories between AI chatbots (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
author: BurnaAI

plugins.name: chatbot-memory-extractor
plugins.description: Extract user context from any chatbot export (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, generic JSON/text) into a universal portable format with confidence scoring and recency/frequency weighting.

plugins.name: chatbot-memory-importer
plugins.description: Convert universal portable context into platform-specific formats: Claude preferences, Claude memories, generic LLM system prompts, and more.
